title: Delicate Slovakian Morbiere Dumplings
description: A kid-friendly Slovakian dish featuring Morbiere cheese in a delicate dumpling, served in a bamboo steamer. This pungent and shattering dish is perfect for a family dinner.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the sifted flour, crumbled Morbiere cheese, and a pinch of salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, and melted butter.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until a smooth dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes elastic.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and shape each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape and place it in a bamboo steamer lined with parchment paper.
Steam the dumplings over boiling water for 10 minutes.
While the dumplings are steaming, heat the bechamel sauce in a saucepan over medium heat.
Serve the dumplings with the heated bechamel sauce spooned over the top.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley or chives, if desired.
